#libs
```{r}
library(vegan)
library(phyloseq)
```

#code
```{r}
# Reqd phyloseq
#ps <-  readRDS('/home/sonec_iv/RSF_res_4_ps/RSF_ps_mags.rds')
#ps <-  readRDS('/home/sonec_iv/RSF_res_4_ps/RSF_all_physeq_wgs_COUNTS_v2.rds')
ps <-  readRDS('/home/sonec_iv/RSF_res_4_ps/hm3/RSF_ps_humann_joint.rds')
ps <- prune_samples(sample_sums(ps) > 10, ps)
otu_table <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps))  # Samples as rows

# Corrected PERMANOVA code
metadata <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(ps@sam_data))
metadata$No_Patient <- NULL

# Now let's fix the column types
# First, let's see what we're working with

# Convert numeric columns
numeric_cols <- c("Age", "Weight", "Height", "BMI")
for(col in numeric_cols) {
  if(col %in% names(metadata)) {
    metadata[[col]] <- as.numeric(metadata[[col]])
  }
}
names(metadata)
# Convert factor columns (all the formula variables except the numeric ones we already converted)
factor_vars <- setdiff(names(metadata), numeric_cols)

for(col in factor_vars) {
  if(col %in% names(metadata)) {
    metadata[[col]] <- as.factor(metadata[[col]])
  }
}

# Define output directory
output_dir <- "/home/sonec_iv/RSF_permanovas/permdisp/permdisp_PATHS_v2/"
# Create directory if it doesn't exist (recursively)
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Keep ID and Sample_collection_date as character (they're fine as is)
excluded_columns <- c("Batch", "No_Patient", "SampleID", "Group")
factor_vars <- setdiff(factor_vars, excluded_columns)
#factor_vars
cols_to_keep <- factor_vars
for (var in cols_to_keep) {
  if (!var %in% colnames(metadata)) next
  non_na <- !is.na(metadata[[var]])
  meta_sub <- metadata[non_na, , drop = FALSE]
  otu_sub <- otu_table[non_na, ]
  
  valid_samples <- rowSums(otu_sub) > 0
  otu_sub <- otu_sub[valid_samples, ]
  meta_sub <- meta_sub[valid_samples, , drop = FALSE]
  
  group <- droplevels(factor(meta_sub[[var]]))
  if (nlevels(group) < 2 || min(table(group)) < 2) next
  
  dist_matrix <- vegdist(otu_sub, method = "bray")
  dispersion <- betadisper(dist_matrix, group = group)
  perm_test <- permutest(dispersion, permutations = 999)
  cat("\nPERMDISP (method='bray') results for", var, ":\n")
  print(perm_test)

  # Plot with adjusted margins and labels
  png(paste0("/home/sonec_iv/RSF_permanovas/permdisp/permdisp_PATHS_v2/PERMDISP_", var, ".png"), width = 1200, height = 600)
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(8, 5, 4, 2))  # Larger bottom margin (8)
  
  # Boxplot: Rotated (90°) and smaller group labels
  boxplot(dispersion, 
          main = paste("Dispersion by", var),
          ylab = "Distance to Centroid",
          col = rainbow(nlevels(group)),
          las = 2,          # Rotate group labels 90°
          cex.axis = 0.8,   # Smaller group labels
          xlab = "",        # Remove redundant x-axis title
          xaxt = "n")       # Suppress default x-axis
  
  # Add rotated group labels with adjusted spacing
  text(
    x = 1:nlevels(group),
    y = par("usr")[3] - 0.02 * diff(par("usr")[3:4]),  # Position below plot
    labels = levels(group),
    srt = 90,           # 90° rotation
    adj = 1,            # Right-align labels
    xpd = TRUE,         # Allow drawing outside plot area
    cex = 0.8           # Smaller label size
  )
  
  # Ordination plot (unchanged)
  plot(dispersion, hull = FALSE, ellipse = TRUE,
       main = paste("Multivariate Dispersion:", var),
       col = 1:nlevels(group), pch = 16)
  legend("topright", legend = levels(group),
         col = 1:nlevels(group), pch = 16, cex = 0.8)
  
  dev.off()
  
  #cat("\nResults for", var, ":\n")
  #print(perm_test)
}
```
